title: Variant result file
description: Per-variant evaluation result, written by the variant sub-agent to <workspace>/../result.json (i.e. .agents/evolutions/<id>-<slug>/variants/<vid>/result.json). The parent agent reads this file after dispatch — the file is the contract, not the chat reply. Missing file = harness error.

status.description: `evaluated` means gates ran (one or more may have failed — read `gates[].passes`). `errored` is a sub-agent failure. `killed` is a per-variant timeout.

gates.description: One entry per declared gate, in declared order. Empty only when status != evaluated.

rubric.description: One entry per declared rubric axis. Omit entirely when any gate failed — failed variants are not measured.

notes.description: Optional one-paragraph free text — surprises, caveats, anything the next generation should know.

output.description: Trimmed verifier output, one line — for audit.
